_note: Edit freely. Read by BOTH the /news-radar slash command and the /api/radar cron. Sources flagged webfetchBlocked:true are unreachable from Claude Code's WebFetch sandbox but work fine from the Vercel cron, so the slash command skips them and the cron includes them.

press.name: GamesRadar
press.focus: Broad gaming coverage, lots of features

anime.name: Anime News Network
anime.focus: Anime + manga industry news of record: adaptations, licensing, staff, air dates

anime.name: LiveChart
anime.focus: Air dates, key visuals, trailers, seasonal chart changes

youtube._note: YouTube channels expose RSS via https://www.youtube.com/feeds/videos.xml?channel_id=CHANNEL_ID. Add channels you follow. Leave empty to skip YouTube.

_upcoming._note: Read by /preview-radar only, NOT by /news-radar or the /api/radar cron. These are release-calendar and wishlist surfaces, not news feeds: they answer 'what is coming' rather than 'what happened'. Steam pages are HTML, not RSS, so WebFetch them with an extraction prompt.

calendars.name: Steam Upcoming
calendars.focus: Near-term releases, next ~2 weeks, ordered by date

calendars.name: Steam Top Wishlisted
calendars.focus: Anticipation ranking: the single best signal for what players actually want

calendars.name: Steam Popular Upcoming
calendars.focus: Dated upcoming releases sorted by wishlist volume

calendars.name: Steam Next Fest
calendars.focus: Demo festival: the richest source of playable indie previews. Only live during fest windows.

anime_calendars.name: LiveChart Upcoming
anime_calendars.focus: Season-by-season anime premiere chart with air dates

anime_calendars.name: ANN Upcoming Anime
anime_calendars.focus: Seasonal encyclopedia listing, studio + staff attached

_http_errors.name: Bungie News
_http_errors._tip: URL may have changed; check bungie.net for current feed endpoint

_http_errors.name: Blizzard News
_http_errors._tip: URL may have changed; check news.blizzard.com footer for RSS

_http_errors.name: Crunchyroll News
_http_errors._tip: Checked 2026-07-20: /newsrss 404s and /news/rss returns the SPA shell, not XML. Crunchyroll appears to have dropped RSS entirely. LiveChart covers the same beat.

_http_errors.name: Otaku USA
_http_errors._tip: Feed is valid but stale: newest item as of 2026-07-20 was Sept 2025. Site appears dormant. Re-check before adding.
